ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "exp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was created */,
  "region_id" TEXT /* ID of the region where the experiment was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., approved, pending) */,
  "flag" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate special conditions or warnings */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment type */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the experiment */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who last modified the experiment */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the experiment was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES experiment_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequences" (
  "seq_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequence */,
  "exp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the sequence belongs to */,
  "seq_name" TEXT /* Name of the sequence */,
  "seq_data" TEXT /* Sequence data */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the sequence */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the sequence */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the sequence */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who last modified the sequence */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the sequence was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequences_exp_id FOREIGN KEY ("exp_id") REFERENCES experiments ("exp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequence status */,
  "seq_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence the status belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sequence (e.g., approved, pending) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date when the sequence status was updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the status entry */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who last modified the status entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the status entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_status_seq_id FOREIGN KEY ("seq_id") REFERENCES sequences ("seq_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the region entry */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who last modified the region entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the region entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment type */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the experiment type */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who last modified the experiment type */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the experiment type was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_sequence" (
  "exp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "seq_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the relationship */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who last modified the relationship */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exp_id", "seq_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_experiments" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user */,
  "exp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the relationship */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who last modified the relationship */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "exp_id")
)
